svg.title: Helix Stax Infrastructure Architecture Diagram
svg.desc: Five-layer architecture diagram showing the Helix Stax K3s infrastructure on Hetzner Cloud, including Cloudflare edge, cluster nodes with CrowdSec IDS, platform services, applications, and external services. Animated traffic flows show request and response paths through the system.

g.text: K3s on Hetzner Cloud -- Traffic Flow and Component Map
